storyBeat: 國王擔心王冠 — 派人去查真假

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚故事要認識的 4 個字，左邊中文、右邊英文：
🔑 king = 國王
🔑 crown = 王冠
🔑 gold = 金子
🔑 pure = 純的
記住這 4 個字，故事聽起來就輕鬆多了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in Syracuse, there lived a clever man named Archimedes.
questions.explanationZh: 很久很久以前，在 Syracuse 城，住著一個聰明人，叫 Archimedes。奶奶說，光是念他的名字就覺得他一定很厲害。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king had a new crown of bright, shiny gold.
questions.question: What did the king have?
questions.explanationZh: 國王有一頂閃閃發光的金王冠。他可得意啦——答案就是「全新的金王冠」。
questions.sentenceZh: 國王有一頂閃閃發亮的純金新王冠。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the king worried that some silver was mixed in with the gold.
questions.questionEn: Was the king sure the crown was all gold?
questions.explanationZh: 國王怕王冠裡摻了銀子——他自己也不確定啊。所以他對真相沒把握，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 但國王擔心，王冠裡可能摻了銀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He sent for Archimedes and asked for help.
questions.explanationZh: 他一個人想不出辦法，就派人叫了 Archimedes 來。有聰明的朋友真好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Find out the truth, but do not break my crown," the king said.
questions.question: What rule did the king give Archimedes?
questions.explanationZh: 「找到真相，但不要弄壞我的王冠喔。」——「do not break」就是「保持完整」。
questions.sentenceZh: 「查出真相，但不能把我的王冠弄壞。」國王說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Archimedes bowed his head and took the crown in his hands.
questions.explanationZh: Archimedes 低頭行禮，兩手小心地把王冠捧起來。那表情，像是捧著一個珍寶。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He felt the weight of the puzzle as much as the weight of the gold.
questions.question: How did Archimedes feel about the task?
options: a bit like a soft song
questions.explanationZh: 「這個謎題的重量，跟王冠一樣沉。」——他心裡已經把它當成一個沉重的謎了。
questions.sentenceZh: 他感覺到這個謎題的重量，不亞於黃金的重量。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked home with the crown and a big question in his head.
questions.explanationZh: 他把王冠帶回家，腦子裡塞著一個大大的問號。走路的步伐也重了呢。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Archimedes feel as he walked home?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 帶著大問題走路 → 當然是「深深在思考」。那個 🤔 臉就是他了！
questions.sentenceZh: 走回家的路上，阿基米德心裡在想什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At home, he set the crown on the table and stared at it for a long time...
questions.explanationZh: 回到家，他把王冠擺在桌上，就這樣盯著它看……奶奶說，這叫「把眼睛盯出窟窿」。

storyBeat: 面對謎題 — 不能切, 不能熔, 該怎麼測?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚故事的 4 個字：
🔑 puzzle = 謎題
🔑 cut = 切
🔑 melt = 熔
🔑 inside = 裡面
每個字都好用，記起來吧！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Archimedes held the crown in his hands and looked at it for a long time.
questions.explanationZh: Archimedes 把王冠捧在手裡，翻來翻去，看了又看，就是不說話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could not cut it open. He could not melt it down.
questions.question: What two things could Archimedes not do to the crown?
options: damage the crown in any way
questions.explanationZh: 不能切、不能熔——兩種方法都被封死了。這樣當然只剩一個答案：「不能破壞王冠」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他不能切開它，也不能把它熔掉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He turned the crown over and over in the soft lamp light.
questions.questionEn: Was Archimedes studying the crown with great care?
questions.explanationZh: 在柔和的燈光下，他把王冠翻來翻去——這樣的人，當然是在「仔細研究」，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他在柔和的燈光下，把王冠翻來翻去地看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "How can I tell what is inside, without breaking it?" he thought.
questions.explanationZh: 「不破壞它，我要怎麼知道裡面是什麼？」這個問題連奶奶聽了都皺眉頭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No tool he knew could read what hid inside the gold.
questions.question: Why was the puzzle so hard?
options: no tool he had could see inside
the king had taken his desk
questions.explanationZh: 他翻遍腦袋裡所有工具，沒有一個能看穿金屬——「沒有工具能看進去」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他知道的方法，沒有一個能讀出黃金裡頭藏著什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He sat down on a low stool and thought and thought.
questions.explanationZh: 他坐在矮凳上，想了又想。奶奶說，這叫「把屁股和板凳黏在一起地想」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hour after hour went by, but no answer came to his mind.
questions.question: Did Archimedes find an answer quickly?
options: yes, a short rest gave him the idea
no, time passed with no answer
no, but a friend told him
optionsZh: 是,休息一下靈感就來了
questions.explanationZh: 一個小時過去、再一個小時——沒答案。所以是「時間過去都沒答案」，不是靈感忽然來。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個小時又一個小時過去了，腦子裡就是想不出答案。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The puzzle felt as heavy as the crown itself.
questions.explanationZh: 這個謎題，跟王冠一樣重——壓在胸口的感覺。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Archimedes feel about the puzzle?
questions.question: How did he feel?
questions.explanationZh: 想了好久還是沒解 → 「卡住又困惑」，那個 🌀 最像他當時的狀態。
questions.sentenceZh: 阿基米德對這個謎題有什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He went home with the puzzle still big and dark inside his head...
questions.explanationZh: 腦子裡裝著一個又大又黑的謎，就這樣回家去了……奶奶說，這才是故事真正要開始的地方。

storyBeat: 想了好幾天 — 朋友擔心, 他決定去洗澡

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 day = 天
🔑 desk = 桌子
🔑 tired = 累
🔑 bath = 洗澡
記好了，等一下就用到！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: For days Archimedes sat at his desk and drew shapes on the floor.
questions.explanationZh: 好幾天，他就坐在桌前，拿手指在地上畫來畫去。那些圓圈和線條，是他腦袋裡的想法。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not eat much. He slept very little.
questions.question: What was Archimedes like during these days?
options: eating big meals all day long
playing games out in the garden
questions.explanationZh: 吃得少、睡得少——整個人都投進去了。「吃得少又睡得少」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他吃得很少，睡得很少。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friends knocked on his door, but he barely heard them.
questions.questionEn: Was Archimedes paying attention to people around him?
questions.explanationZh: 朋友來敲門，他幾乎沒聽見——眼睛和耳朵都在謎題那邊。他沒注意身邊，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 朋友敲他的門，他幾乎沒聽見。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friends grew worried about him.
questions.explanationZh: 朋友看他這樣，擔心壞了。吃這麼少、睡這麼少，換誰都擔心呀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They saw his face go thin and his eyes grow dark.
questions.question: What did his friends notice about Archimedes?
options: his face was thin and tired
a new red coat on him
questions.explanationZh: 臉瘦了、眼神暗了——「臉瘦又疲倦」就是朋友看到的樣子。
questions.sentenceZh: 朋友們看見他的臉越來越瘦，眼神越來越暗。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last, Archimedes put down his pen with a tired smile.
questions.explanationZh: 最後，他帶著一個疲憊的微笑放下筆。好像在說：「好啦，讓腦袋休息一下。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "My mind needs a rest. I will take a warm bath," he said.
questions.question: What did Archimedes decide to do?
options: go back to the king with no answer
soak in hot water to clear his head
run a long race around the city
sell the gold crown at the market
optionsZh: 沒有答案就回去找國王
把金王冠拿去市場賣掉
questions.explanationZh: 「腦袋要休息一下，我去洗個熱水澡。」——「泡熱水讓腦袋清醒」就是他的決定。
questions.sentenceZh: 「腦子需要休息了，去泡個熱水澡吧。」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He left the crown on the table and walked to the bath house.
questions.explanationZh: 王冠留在桌上，他走向澡堂。謎題暫時先放著——他不知道接下來會發生什麼事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of break was Archimedes giving himself?
questions.question: What kind of break?
questions.explanationZh: 說要洗熱水澡 → 答案是「熱水澡」！那個 🛁 就是他要去的地方。
questions.sentenceZh: 阿基米德給自己的是哪一種休息？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He thought the puzzle would have to wait. But the bath had a surprise for him...
questions.explanationZh: 他以為謎題要等一等——沒想到，浴缸裡藏著一個大驚喜在等他……

storyBeat: 進浴缸 — 水溢出來, 他看見了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 tub = 浴缸
🔑 water = 水
🔑 step in = 踏進
🔑 spill = 溢出
準備好了嗎？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The bath was full to the top with warm water.
questions.explanationZh: 浴缸裝滿溫水，水面就在缸口邊緣——滿到再多一點就會溢出來的那種。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Archimedes stepped in slowly, one foot at a time.
questions.question: How did Archimedes get into the tub?
questions.explanationZh: 他慢慢地踏進去，一腳、一腳——「慢慢小心地走進」就是答案。不急，不急。
questions.sentenceZh: 阿基米德慢慢踏進去，先踩一隻腳，再踩另一隻腳。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: As he sat down, water spilled over the edge onto the floor.
questions.questionEn: Did the water level inside the tub stay the same?
questions.explanationZh: 他一坐下，水嘩啦一下就溢到地板上——水位當然變了，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他一坐下去，水就從邊緣溢出來，灑到地上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at the water on the floor with wide, bright eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 他瞪大那雙疲倦的眼睛，看著地板上的水。那表情，像是某個東西正要從心裡跳出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Most people would have called for a cloth to wipe it up.
questions.question: What did most people do when bath water spilled?
options: ask for a cloth to wipe it
pour more water in the tub
questions.explanationZh: 別人看到地板濕了，當然是叫人來拿布擦——「找布擦掉」就是普通人的反應。
questions.sentenceZh: 大多數人會拿條布把水擦掉就算了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But Archimedes stopped, and his heart started to beat fast.
questions.explanationZh: 但 Archimedes 停下來了，心跳「咚咚咚」加快。他看到別人看不到的東西了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water on the floor looked just the size of his body in the tub.
questions.question: What did the spilled water match in size?
options: only the size of his hand
as much room as he took up
just the size of his head
questions.explanationZh: 溢出的水，大小剛好等於他身體在水裡佔的空間。「跟他佔的空間一樣多」——就是這個！
questions.sentenceZh: 地上那灘水，剛好和他泡在浴缸裡的身體一樣大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His tired eyes lit up. The puzzle in his head began to move.
questions.explanationZh: 疲倦的眼睛突然亮了——腦袋裡有什麼東西開始動了。快了，快了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Archimedes' face look in that moment?
questions.question: How did his face look?
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛亮起來 + 謎題有動靜 → 「靈感亮了起來」！那個 💡 就是他的眼神。
questions.sentenceZh: 在那個瞬間，阿基米德的表情是什麼樣子？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He sat very still in the water. Then, in one quick breath, the idea came...
questions.explanationZh: 他靜靜坐在水裡，然後——吸一口氣——點子來了……奶奶說，那一秒鐘，改變了整個科學史。

storyBeat: 想通了! 跳出浴缸大喊 Eureka!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 idea = 點子
🔑 size = 大小
🔑 weight = 重量
🔑 shout = 大喊
這一節很精彩，記好字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "The water that came out is the same size as my body in the tub!"
questions.explanationZh: 「溢出的水，大小剛好和我的身體一樣！」——他在浴缸裡就想通了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Now he knew. Gold and silver have different sizes for the same weight.
questions.question: What was the secret Archimedes found?
options: gold and silver have the same size
same weight can have different size
silver always weighs more than gold
optionsZh: 相同重量可以有不同大小
questions.explanationZh: 金和銀，重量相同，但大小不一樣——「相同重量可以有不同大小」就是他發現的秘密。
questions.sentenceZh: 他明白了：同樣的重量，金和銀佔的空間不一樣大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw in his mind the crown going into a bowl of water.
questions.questionEn: Was Archimedes already planning a test?
questions.explanationZh: 他腦袋裡已經在演練：把王冠放進水裡，看水位……他已經開始計畫了，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他腦子裡出現了畫面：把王冠放進一盆水裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could put the crown in water and watch the water rise.
questions.explanationZh: 把王冠放進水，水位會升高——升高多少，就能知道王冠有多大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: If pure gold of the same weight pushed up less water, the crown was not pure.
questions.question: How could Archimedes tell if the crown was pure?
options: smell the metal of the crown
watch how the water level moved
check its color in the sun
listen to its sound when tapped
optionsZh: 聞一聞王冠金屬的味道
questions.explanationZh: 如果純金和王冠重量相同，水位卻升得不一樣——王冠就不是純金！答案是「看水位變化」。
questions.sentenceZh: 如果同重的純金排出的水比較少，王冠就不純。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A huge smile broke across his face.
questions.explanationZh: 一個大大的笑容開在他臉上——那種壓了好幾天的石頭終於滾走的感覺。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He felt the kind of happy you feel when a long question finally opens.
questions.question: How did Archimedes feel at this moment?
options: as quiet and sad as a rainy day
as happy as solving a long puzzle
as sleepy and slow as a snail
as cold and tired as the night
optionsZh: 像下雨天一樣安靜難過
像解開長久謎題一樣開心
questions.explanationZh: 「解開了一個好久的謎題」那種開心——「像解開長久謎題一樣開心」就是他的感受。
questions.sentenceZh: 他感覺到那種快樂——一個很久的問題終於被打開了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He jumped out of the bath and called out, "Eureka! Eureka!"
questions.explanationZh: 他從浴缸跳出來，大喊「Eureka！Eureka！」——誰說洗澡不能有大發現？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In old Greek, "Eureka" means what?
questions.question: "Eureka" 的意思是什麼?
questions.explanationZh: 「Eureka！」是古希臘文——意思是「我找到了！」這是世界上最有名的一聲大喊。
questions.sentenceZh: 「Eureka」用古希臘文是什麼意思？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He ran to find the king, with his big idea ready to share...
questions.explanationZh: 他跑去找國王，心裡裝著大發現，腳步輕快得像在飛……奶奶說，這叫「帶著答案跑」。

storyBeat: 把發現告訴國王 — 試驗王冠真假

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 run = 跑
🔑 palace = 皇宮
🔑 plan = 計畫
🔑 bowl = 碗
快記，故事要到高潮了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Archimedes ran to the palace with a big smile on his face.
questions.explanationZh: 他帶著滿臉大笑，一路跑到皇宮——奶奶說，這是她最喜歡的那種跑法：「帶著答案跑」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He told the king his plan in clear, simple words.
questions.question: How did Archimedes explain his plan?
questions.explanationZh: 他用清楚又簡單的話，把計畫說給國王聽——「簡單清楚」就是答案，不拐彎抹角。
questions.sentenceZh: 他用清楚簡單的話，把計畫告訴了國王。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king leaned forward in his big chair to hear every word.
questions.questionEn: Was the king very interested in the plan?
questions.explanationZh: 國王身體往前傾，一個字也不想漏掉——這樣的人，當然是「很感興趣」，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 國王身體向前傾，想聽清楚每一個字。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king brought a wide bowl of water to the room.
questions.explanationZh: 國王拿了一個大寬碗裝水，準備來做實驗了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Beside the crown they placed a piece of pure gold of the same weight.
questions.question: What did they put next to the crown?
options: a tall glass of warm milk
questions.explanationZh: 他們在王冠旁邊，放了一塊「重量一樣的純金」——這樣才能比出差別。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們在王冠旁邊放了一塊同樣重量的純金。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They put the crown in the bowl first. They marked the water line.
questions.explanationZh: 先放王冠進水，記下水面的位置——這是實驗的第一步。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then they put in the pure gold. The water rose to a lower mark.
questions.question: What did the water do for the pure gold?
questions.explanationZh: 放入純金，水位升得比較低——「停在比較低的位置」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 再放進純金，水位升得比較低。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two amounts of water were not the same. The crown was not pure gold.
questions.explanationZh: 兩次水位不一樣，代表……王冠不是純金！謎底揭曉了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the king feel about knowing the truth?
questions.question: How did the king feel?
questions.explanationZh: 國王終於知道真相了。那種「謝謝你把我心裡的石頭拿走」的感謝 → 「感謝得到答案」。
questions.sentenceZh: 國王知道真相後是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king turned to Archimedes and held out his hand with a soft smile...
questions.explanationZh: 國王轉向 Archimedes，溫和地伸出手……奶奶說，這個動作比任何話都有份量。

storyBeat: 法則傳到今天 — 每個玩水的小孩都像他

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 thank = 謝謝
🔑 science = 科學
🔑 law = 法則
🔑 today = 今天
最後一課，好好記！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king thanked Archimedes for finding the truth.
questions.explanationZh: 國王謝謝 Archimedes 找到真相——那聲謝謝，值了好幾天沒睡的苦。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The rule from that bath became part of science forever.
questions.question: What happened to the rule from the bath?
options: it was forgotten the next day
it is still used by people today
only the king kept it safe
it was hidden away in secret
questions.explanationZh: 那次洗澡得到的發現，變成了永遠的科學法則——「今天還在用」就是答案，不是只有那個時代用。
questions.sentenceZh: 那次洗澡得出的定律，從此成為科學的一部分，永遠流傳。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Boats, ships, and even small toys still use this rule today.
questions.questionEn: Is Archimedes' rule still used in the world?
questions.explanationZh: 船、玩具水鴨、游泳池……到今天這個規則還在用——當然「今天還在用」，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 船、大輪船，甚至小玩具，今天都還用著這個原理。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: We still call it Archimedes' law today.
questions.explanationZh: 我們今天還叫它「Archimedes 法則」——也叫浮力原理。洗澡洗出來的科學！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big idea came from a small thing he saw with care.
questions.question: Where did the big idea come from?
options: a magic spell from an old wizard
careful watching of a small thing
an old thick book full of numbers
a long dream during his noon rest
optionsZh: 一本寫滿數字的厚舊書
questions.explanationZh: 大點子來自仔細觀察一件小事——「仔細觀察一件小事」就是答案。水溢出來這件事，別人都忽略了。
questions.sentenceZh: 偉大的想法，來自他用心看見的一件小事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And every kid who tries an idea in the bath is a little like him.
questions.explanationZh: 每個在浴缸裡試點子的小孩，都有一點像 Archimedes。說不定你也是呢！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A bath, a bowl, a puddle — anywhere can be a tiny science lab.
questions.question: Where can a small science lesson happen?
questions.explanationZh: 浴缸、碗、水坑——到處都可以當小小的科學實驗室。「在日常的小地方」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 浴缸、水盆、水窪——任何地方都可以是一個小小的科學實驗室。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All you need are open eyes and a head full of why.
questions.explanationZh: 「張開眼睛，帶著一顆充滿「為什麼」的腦袋。」——這就是奶奶最喜歡說的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is the main lesson from Archimedes?
questions.question: What does the story teach?
options: 🏃 run as fast as you can
🍔 eat a big meal every night
questions.explanationZh: 仔細觀察小事 → 發現大道理。這就是故事教我們的事！「仔細觀察小事」是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 從阿基米德的故事，我們學到什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What small thing did you notice today? It might be the start of a big idea...
questions.explanationZh: 你今天有沒有注意到什麼小事？搞不好，那就是一個大發現的種子……
